sglang.title: Qwen3next flashinfer allreduce auto enable
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Made with @codex
Summary
Enable FlashInfer allreduce fusion by default for Qwen3NextForCausalLM on supported single-node SM90/SM100 TP runs.
Why
Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-Next was running with enable_flashinfer_allreduce_fusion=false on H100, and profiler traces showed prefill time dominated by unfused cross

sglang.title: diffusion: add HunyuanVideo GroupNorm+SiLU fast path
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a Triton GroupNorm + SiLU fast path for HunyuanVideoResnetBlockCausal3D only.
It is gated by SGLANG_USE_CUDA_HUNYUANVIDEO_GROUP_NORM_SILU=1.
H100 (CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1) benchmark on latest main:

DenoisingStage: 41406.19 -> 41582.68 ms (+0.4%)
DecodingStage: 15514.60 -> 14548.95 ms (-

vllm.title: Added general ND x ND matmul and unit test for it
vllm.author: YM2132
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add a general ND x ND batch invariant matmul branch. The Gemma4-E2B model has a 4D x 3D matmul, which is not covered by the batch invariant implementation at the moment. This PR fixes: #38892 and the general implementation ensures all shapes supported by torch.matmul are now supported by bat

vllm.title: [Attention] TurboQuant: remove redundant random signs, add prior art attribution
vllm.author: dalistarh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary


Remove per-layer random sign flips from the Hadamard rotation. The Hadamard signs should have no effect on Lloyd-Max quantization quality; first, because the quantizer is symmetric around zero, and second because the randomness will add variance. In this PR, all layers now share the same p

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Guard mxfp4_experts_quant bindings on ENABLE_NVFP4_SM100
vllm.author: ultism
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The SM_100 and SM_120 NVFP4 build branches in CMakeLists.txt have asymmetric source lists:

The SM_120 branch (lines 910–941, consumer Blackwell — RTX 50 series) compiles:

nvfp4_quant_kernels.cu, activation_nvfp4_quant_fusion_kernels.cu, nvfp4_experts_quant.cu, nvfp4_scaled_mm_sm120_kernels

vllm.title: [Frontend] Preserve structured output special tokens in offline LLM.chat
vllm.author: lucianommartins
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When using the offline API (LLM.chat) with models that encode structured output syntax as special tokens (such as Gemma 4's thinking delimiters <|channel> and tool call tokens <|tool_call>), the current default skip_special_tokens=True in SamplingParams strips these tokens from output.text.

vllm.title: [KV Connector] Allow metrics of multiple connectors of same types in multi connector.
vllm.author: omerpaz95
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix stats collection and Prometheus metric registration in MultiConnector when multiple connectors of the same class are configured (e.g., two OffloadingConnector instances
for different transfer types).
Two bugs fixed:


Stats overwrite — get_kv_connector_stats() keyed stats by class name,

vllm.title: [KV Offload] Pass request context
vllm.author: omerpaz95
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Pass per-request context (kv_transfer_params) through the CPU offloading manager interface.
The OffloadingManager ABC and CPUOffloadingManager now accept a ReqContext argument on lookup, prepare_load, and prepare_store. ReqContext wraps request.kv_transfer_params (a free-form dict set via sa
